products.name: Customized Hybrid Multi-Rotor UAS
products.descriptor: Made-to-measure hybrid multi-rotor UAS for survey and inspection missions

evidence.snippet: ![Customized Hybrid Multi-Rotor UAS](//www.orthodrone.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/01/uas-f.jpg)![Our made-to-measure UAS provide for maximum mission time, efficiency and flexibility, as well as superior data quality.](//www.orthodrone.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/01/uas-b.jpg)

products.name: Survey-Grade Unmanned Aerial LiDAR
products.descriptor: UAV-based LiDAR survey service using industry-leading sensors for precise 3D modeling

evidence.snippet: ![Survey-Grade Unmanned Aerial LiDAR](//www.orthodrone.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/lidar-f.jpg)![With industry-leading LiDAR systems, we acquire consistent data and generate precise models -- even through dense vegetation.](//www.orthodrone.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/01/lidar-b.jpg)

products.name: Ultra-High Resolution Photogrammetry
products.descriptor: UAV photogrammetry service controlling multiple metric camera payloads via onboard OPU

evidence.snippet: ![Ultra-High Resolution Photogrammetry](//www.orthodrone.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/01/photogrammetry-f.jpg)![Utilizing our onboard processing unit (OPU), we simultaneously control multiple cutting-edge metric camera payloads.](//www.orthodrone.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/photogrammetry-b.jpg)

products.name: Tailored Data Acquisition Solutions
products.descriptor: Custom hard- and software data acquisition service combining best-in-class sensor technology

evidence.snippet: ![Tailored Data Acquisition Solutions](//www.orthodrone.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/01/acquisition-f.jpg)![Orthodrone's hard- and software innovations combine practical experience with best-in-class technology.](//www.orthodrone.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/08/acquisition-b.jpg)

products.name: Onboard Processing Unit (OPU)
products.descriptor: Proprietary in-house onboard processing unit controlling multiple metric camera payloads

evidence.snippet: ![Ultra-High Resolution Photogrammetry](//www.orthodrone.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/01/photogrammetry-f.jpg)![Utilizing our onboard processing unit (OPU), we simultaneously control multiple cutting-edge metric camera payloads.](//www.orthodrone.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/photogrammetry-b.jpg)

products.name: Spatial Data Analysis
